span.p: A business metric e.g. revenue, active user

span.p: Already defined in the semantic/metrics layer?

span.p: Reference the governed definition - never re-derive in a mart or BI calc

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p: Is it a reusable business KPI multiple consumers will use?

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p: Define once as metrics-as-code: explicit grain + filters -> semantic-layer-engineer

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p: Could it drift into a KPI later?

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p: Compute in the mart, document the grain

span.p: Every BI tool consumes the one definition
